title: chamaecrista glandulosa var. andicola
intro: Chamaecrista glandulosa var. andicola, also known as the 'Andean sensitive plant' or 'Sensitive plant,' is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Chamaecrista glandulosa var. andicola include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, alleviate pain and inflammation, and protect against certain diseases. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
